Title: Add New Store
Preconditions: Stores Module is installed
Steps:
Step Description:
Navigate to More->Stores
Expected Result:
The system opens the 'Stores' module
The 'Add' button is active

Click the 'Add' button

The system opens the 'New Store' (Create New Store) blade
All fields are required 
The 'Create' button is disabled
![](index.php?/attachments/get/22437) 

Step Description:
Fill out the form:

1. Code (required field)- alfanumeric only , no space
2. Name (required field) 
3. Catalog- drop down. Select the catalog 
4. Default language- drop down. Select from drop down
5. Default currency- drop down. Select from drop down
6. State- drop down. Select the state from drop down
![](index.php?/attachments/get/22442)

The 'Create' button becomes active

Click 'Create' 
Expected Result:
A new Store is created and displayed on the Stores blade
The new store details are displayed in editable format 
![](index.php?/attachments/get/22443)
Steps (Expected Result):
1. The system opens the 'Stores' module
The 'Add' button is active
2. The system opens the 'New Store' (Create New Store) blade
All fields are required 
The 'Create' button is disabled
![](index.php?/attachments/get/22437) 

3. The 'Create' button becomes active
4. A new Store is created and displayed on the Stores blade
The new store details are displayed in editable format 
![](index.php?/attachments/get/22443)
Steps (Step):
1. Navigate to More->Stores
2. Click the 'Add' button 
3. Fill out the form:

1. Code (required field)- alfanumeric only , no space
2. Name (required field) 
3. Catalog- drop down. Select the catalog 
4. Default language- drop down. Select from drop down
5. Default currency- drop down. Select from drop down
6. State- drop down. Select the state from drop down
![](index.php?/attachments/get/22442) 



4. Click 'Create'

Title: Edit Store Details (input fields)

Expected Result:
The system opens the Store details in editable format

Step Description:
Edit Store name:

In the Store name field edit the name


Expected Result:
The system displays the edited name
Validation: only alphanumeric
Step Description:
Edit Catalog:

Open the drop down list and select a different catalog
Expected Result:
The system displays the newly selected catalog
Step Description:
Edit State:

The system displays the new state in the field
Step Description:
Enter Store URL 
(This field is optional)

Step Description:
Edit default language- select a different default language from the drop down

follow the same steps as for 'Add a new state'

Title: Edit Aggregation properties
Preconditions: Store is added and exists in the Stores Module
Steps:
Step Description:
Open the Store details blade and click on the 'Aggregation properties' widget
Expected Result:
The system opens the 'Filtering properties' blade
 ![](index.php?/attachments/get/1000004627) 

Step Description:
To add a new property select the desired property from the list on the left and click on it
Expected Result:
The system displays the new property under the 'Selected properties' on the right 
Step Description:
To unselect the property, click delete (cross) the property from the list on the right side under 'Selected properties' 
Expected Result:
The system removes the property from the selected list 
Step Description:
Select a property from the 'Selected properties' list and click on it 
Expected Result:
The system opens the property details blade in editable format 
The property name filed is a label (not editable) 
Aggregation type is a drop down with two options: Attribute, Range
Aggregation size is editable and displayed only when 'Attribute' is selected
Allowed values- editable. The system allows removing the existing values and adding new ones 
'Cancel' and 'OK' buttons are enabled
Step Description:
Click in the text box under 'Allowed values' and enter a new value - type a text and click on the blue text field that appears on the bottom of the box
Expected Result:
The system adds the new value 
Step Description:
Delete one ore more of the existing values by clicking the 'x' icon 
Expected Result:
The system removes the value from the text box
Step Description:
Click the 'OK' button 
Expected Result:
The system saves the changes
Step Description:
Make changes and click the 'Cancel button
Expected Result:
The system displays the warning message 
 ![](index.php?/attachments/get/1000004628) 

Step Description:
Confirm canceling the operation 
Expected Result:
The system cancels the operation. Changes will not be saved
Steps (Expected Result):
1. The system opens the 'Filtering properties' blade
 ![](index.php?/attachments/get/1000004627) 

2. The system displays the new property under the 'Selected properties' on the right 
3. The system removes the property from the selected list 
4. The system opens the property details blade in editable format 
The property name filed is a label (not editable) 
Aggregation type is a drop down with two options: Attribute, Range
Aggregation size is editable and displayed only when 'Attribute' is selected
Allowed values- editable. The system allows removing the existing values and adding new ones 
'Cancel' and 'OK' buttons are enabled
5. The system adds the new value 
6. The system removes the value from the text box
7. The system saves the changes
8. The system displays the warning message 
 ![](index.php?/attachments/get/1000004628) 

9. The system cancels the operation. Changes will not be saved
Steps (Step):
1. Open the Store details blade and click on the 'Aggregation properties' widget
2. To add a new property select the desired property from the list on the left and click on it
3. To unselect the property, click delete (cross) the property from the list on the right side under 'Selected properties' 
4. Select a property from the 'Selected properties' list and click on it 
5. Click in the text box under 'Allowed values' and enter a new value - type a text and click on the blue text field that appears on the bottom of the box
6. Delete one ore more of the existing values by clicking the 'x' icon 
7. Click the 'OK' button 
8. Make changes and click the 'Cancel button
9. Confirm canceling the operation
